description: SQL injection detection and exploitation patterns. Agent uses these to identify injection points and confirm before running sqlmap.

error_based.description: Trigger database errors to confirm injection
error_based.confirm_pattern: original_value + ' returns error, original_value + '' returns normal = likely injectable

boolean_based.description: Detect injection via boolean logic differences
boolean_based.confirm_pattern: True payload returns different response than false payload

time_based.description: Detect blind injection via time delay

mysql: You have an error in your SQL syntax

mysql.columns: ' UNION SELECT NULL,column_name,NULL FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='users'--

postgresql.tables: ' UNION SELECT NULL,tablename,NULL FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname='public'--

exploitation.order_by_count: Increment ORDER BY number until error to determine column count: ORDER BY 1, ORDER BY 2, ...
exploitation.null_technique: Use NULL values in UNION: NULL is compatible with any column type

out_of_band.description: Requires outbound network from DB server

nosql_patterns.description: NoSQL injection often bypasses authentication by using operators instead of strings

oob_exfil.description: Out-of-band data exfiltration when response-based techniques fail
